content.problemStatement:
You have been given an integer KKK and four arrays AAA, BBB, CCC, and DDD with sizes SAS_ASA‚Äã, SBS_BSB‚Äã, SCS_CSC‚Äã and SDS_DSD‚Äã respectively.

Follow the given steps:


Pick four indices xxx, yyy, zzz, and www from arrays AAA, BBB, CCC, and DDD respectively. Note that (1‚â§x‚â§SA)(1 \le x \le S_A)(1‚â§x‚â§SA‚Äã), (1‚â§y‚â§SB)(1 \le y \le S_B)(1‚â§y‚â§SB‚Äã), (1‚â§z‚â§SC)(1 \le z \le S_C)(1‚â§z‚â§SC‚Äã) and (1‚â§w‚â§SD)(1 \le w \le S_D)(1‚â§w‚â§SD‚Äã).
There are in total SA√óSB√óSC√óSDS_A\times S_B\times S_C\times S_DSA‚Äã√óSB‚Äã√óSC‚Äã√óSD‚Äã ways to do the above step. For each way, write down the value of (Ax+By)√ó(Cz+Dw)(A_x + B_y) \times (C_z + D_w)(Ax‚Äã+By‚Äã)√ó(Cz‚Äã+Dw‚Äã) on a board.
Sort all the numbers written on the board in **non-decreasing** order.
Find the KthK^{th}Kth element written on the board.


Input Format

First line contains five integers SAS_ASA‚Äã, SBS_BSB‚Äã, SCS_CSC‚Äã, SDS_DSD‚Äã and KKK.
The second line contains SAS_ASA‚Äã space-separated integers A1,A2,...,ASAA_1,A_2,...,A_{S_A}A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,...,ASA‚Äã‚Äã denoting the array AAA.
The third line contains SBS_BSB‚Äã space-separated integers B1,B2,...,BSBB_1,B_2,...,B_{S_B}B1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,...,BSB‚Äã‚Äã denoting the array BBB.
The fourth line contains SCS_CSC‚Äã space-separated integers C1,C2,...,CSCC_1,C_2,...,C_{S_C}C1‚Äã,C2‚Äã,...,CSC‚Äã‚Äã denoting the array CCC.
The fifth line contains SDS_DSD‚Äã space-separated integers D1,D2,...,DSDD_1,D_2,...,D_{S_D}D1‚Äã,D2‚Äã,...,DSD‚Äã‚Äã denoting the array DDD.


Output Format
For each test case, output the required number in a single line .

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
After sorting the numbers on the board are in the following order {8,8,10,10,12,15,16,16,20,20,20,25}\{8, 8, 10, 10, 12, 15, 16, 16, 20, 20, 20, 25\}{8,8,10,10,12,15,16,16,20,20,20,25}. So, the 10th10^{th}10th number is 202020.
